title: Resinous Roasted Australian Bread Flatbread
description: A quick-fix Australian dish featuring strong white bread flour, flambe, and low-glycemic-friendly ingredients, this flatbread is perfect for a snack or light meal. It is cooked in a hot-pot vessel to achieve a resinous and springy texture.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the strong white bread flour, salt, sugar, and active dry yeast.
Gradually add the water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a hot-pot vessel and brush the olive oil over the surface.
Sprinkle the chopped rosemary leaves and minced garlic over the dough.
Flambe the dough by igniting the olive oil and rosemary leaves for 30 seconds.
Cover the hot-pot vessel with a lid and cook over medium heat for 10 minutes.
Remove the lid and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the flatbread is golden brown and crispy.
Remove the flatbread from the hot-pot vessel and let it cool for 2 minutes before slicing.
Serve the resinous roasted Australian bread flatbread warm and enjoy.
